overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character navigates from a wet street plaza through dark alleys, covered walkways, and narrow corridors, passing neon signs, vending machines, and other pedestrians in a dystopian urban environment.

events.description: entering dark narrow passage between buildings, visibility drops significantly
wall passes close to camera on right side in narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking past two NPCs conversing on the wet street, then entering a dark alleyway between buildings

standing and talking, then turning to walk away

entered.detail: commercial building facade with teal green trim and illuminated window displays
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted above the street
rain-slicked asphalt street reflecting ambient neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet urban street at night, facing two NPCs engaged in conversation near a storefront with green trim. The player walks forward past the characters and enters a dark narrow passage between buildings where visibility drops significantly.

walking along the building edge in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark passage into an open plaza, the scene reveals a large building with distinctive blue-lit curved windows. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights as the player walks toward the building, passing other pedestrians in the open area.

curved window showing blue-lit mannequins or displays

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway with overhead concrete structure and ascends a staircase. Pink neon billboards illuminate the right wall while blue-lit display windows curve along the left. Other pedestrians navigate the stairs in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with vending machines and residential access

events.description: entering narrow alley with illuminated vending machines
turning left at vending machine cluster to continue through alley

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow back alleys, passing vending machines and utility areas

walking away from camera down the alley

entered.detail: blue automated vending machines with illuminated product displays
weathered concrete apartment building with lit windows and air conditioning units
green illuminated sign with white text reading MARKET
electrical utility equipment and boxes on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into a narrow back alley, the player passes clusters of illuminated vending machines and utility boxes. A green MARKET sign glows in the distance as the player navigates past other pedestrians in the confined space between residential buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with overhead fluorescent lighting

passing under bright overhead fluorescent light fixtures

close concrete walls creating tight passage on both sides

segments.scene_description: The player enters a long, narrow service corridor with close walls on both sides. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the path while green walls covered in red graffiti pass by. The corridor feels enclosed and industrial with exposed piping along the ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit urban district that shifts from open wet streets into increasingly confined industrial corridors. It begins on a rain-slicked street passing two conversing pedestrians before plunging into a dark, narrow passage where visibility drops. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a building with blue-lit curved windows and reflective pavement, leading the viewer up a staircase within a covered walkway flanked by pink neon billboards. The path then tightens as the camera exits the walkway into a cramped back alley filled with glowing vending machines and a distant green market sign. Finally, the environment closes in completely as the camera enters a long service corridor characterized by fluorescent lighting, green walls covered in red graffiti, and exposed overhead piping.
